name: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog
description: CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog — list of vulnerabilities known to be exploited in the wild. Federal agencies must remediate KEV entries by binding operational directive (BOD 22-01).
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud workload protection platforms commonly integrate KEV for prioritized remediation.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
